name: Keebler Easy Elfin Cheesecake (No Bake!)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the cheese until smooth.
2. Gradually beat in sugar.
3. Blend in sour cream and vanilla.
4. Gently fold in whipped topping, ensuring it is well combined.
5. Spoon the mixture into the crust.
6. Chill until set, at least 4 hours.
7. Garnish with fresh strawberries for garnish.
